meaning: n.操作员,工作者,(电话)接线员,报务员,手术员,行家,经营者,算子
examples: The operator will put you through.
He dialled the operator and put in a call to Rome.
He is a very shrewd operator with an incisive mind.
An M60 machine-gun operator rests for a moment with his heavy load of ammunition.
When the Titanic was sinking in 1912, its operator first sent out CQD and then SOS, alternating.
